_comment: Mapping of invalid/obsolete tariff codes to their correct replacements. Validated against CARICOM CET XLSX (HS 2017, revised April 2018). Codes here are auto-corrected by classifier.validate_and_correct_code().
_comment_category_headings: Category headings that have subcodes below them — use the appropriate subcode.

33051010.reason: 33051010 is a subcategory header, not an end-node code

39233000.reason: Category heading 'Carboys, bottles, flasks:' — use 39233010 for bottles (15%, kg, SITC 893.193)

56074900.reason: Category heading 'Other:' — use 56074910 for twine and ropes (15%, kg, SITC 657.5122)

61159900.reason: Category heading 'Of other textile materials:' — use 61159910 for socks/ankle-socks (20%, kg, SITC 846.297)

30049000.reason: Category heading 'Other medicaments, put up in measured doses:' — use 30049090 for Other (zinc oxide ointments, etc.)

96034000.reason: Category heading 'Paint brushes:' — use 96034020 for paint/varnish brushes (15%, kg, SITC 899.7272)

96034090.reason: 96034090 does not exist in CET — use 96034020 for paint/varnish brushes

_comment_wrong_digits: Codes with wrong CET detail digits — suffix does not match any end-node.

84099199.reason: 84099199 does not exist — use 84099120 for marine craft engine parts (0-5%, kg, SITC 713.912)

84831099.reason: 84831099 does not exist — use 84831020 for marine transmission shafts (0-5%, kg, SITC 748.12)

85291099.reason: 85291099 does not exist — only 85291000 for aerials/reflectors (0-5%, kg, SITC 764.931)

73063090.reason: 73063090 does not exist — only 73063000 for welded tubes (0-5%, kg, SITC 679.431)

73181590.reason: 73181590 does not exist — only 73181500 for screws/bolts (0-5%, kg, SITC 694.215)

84219990.reason: 84219990 does not exist — only 84219900 for filter parts (0-5%, kg, SITC 743.95)

32091090.reason: 32091090 does not exist — use 32091010 for paints based on acrylic/vinyl polymers

_comment_wrong_headings: Codes referencing non-existent HS subheadings in the CARICOM CET.

34025000.reason: 3402.50 does not exist in CET — use 34022090 for retail cleaning preparations

61159100.reason: 6115.91 does not exist in CET — use 61152100 for synthetic fibre tights

82030000.reason: 82030000 is heading level — use 82032000 for pliers/pincers/tweezers

82131000.reason: 8213.10 does not exist — use 82130090 for scissors other

85395200.reason: 8539.52 does not exist — use 85395000 for LED lamps

96060000.reason: 96060000 heading level — use 96050000 for travel sewing kits

_comment_national_subcodes: Codes with wrong HS subheading that need remapping to valid subcodes.

32089000.reason: 32089000 is HS subheading — use 32089020 Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

_comment_marine_paints: Budget Marine is a yacht supplies shop. All paints are marine paints. Remap enamel/automotive/other-paint subdivisions to marine paint equivalents.

32081010.reason: Automotive paints → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32081030.reason: Enamels → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32081040.reason: Other paints → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32082010.reason: Automotive paints → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32082030.reason: Enamels → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32082040.reason: Other paints → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32089010.reason: Automotive paints → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32089030.reason: Enamels → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32089040.reason: Other paints → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

32089090.reason: Other → Marine paints (Budget Marine = yacht supplies)

_comment_misclassified: Products classified under completely wrong tariff headings. These are classification errors, not code format errors.

73160000.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 7316 heading does not exist in CET — anchors/grapnels belong in 73158900 (other articles of iron/steel chain)

73161500.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 73161500 is screws/bolts — fish hooks (Baitholder, Kirby etc.) belong in 95072000 (fish-hooks)

95110000.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 9511 heading does not exist in CET — fishing hooks (Sea Kirby etc.) belong in 95072000 (fish-hooks)

33042000.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 33042000 is eye makeup — safety lights/flashlights belong in 85319000 (signaling equipment parts)

61099020.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 61099020 is clothing/singlets — air horns belong in 92089000 (other musical/signaling instruments)

96151110.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 96151110 is combs — magnetic pick-up tools belong in 82059000 (other hand tools)

96061000.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 96061000 is press-fasteners/snaps — fishing floats/snaps belong in 95079090 (other fishing tackle)

96159010.reason: MISCLASSIFIED: 96159010 is hair rollers — paint roller covers/refills belong in 96034020 (paint/varnish brushes)
